overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a sweeping view from the desert Badlands overlooking Night City. The camera glides forward over a winding highway through rocky canyons, gradually revealing the dense cyberpunk metropolis with its distinctive ferris wheel and towering skyscrapers under a clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: piloting aerial drone forward over the desert canyon highway toward the distant city

entered.detail: curving asphalt road cutting through the desert terrain with multiple switchbacks
reddish-brown rocky cliff formations rising above the highway
large white circular ferris wheel visible on the distant city horizon
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a winding asphalt highway cutting through reddish desert canyon terrain. The distant Night City skyline is visible on the horizon with a large white ferris wheel structure standing out. Sparse desert vegetation dots the landscape as the drone moves steadily forward.

events.description: camera pans right revealing dense urban sprawl while desert canyon cliffs recede from view
tall office tower with '07' signage becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing aerial survey of the city outskirts and industrial zones

entered.detail: complex highway exit ramps and overpasses at the city edge
low-rise residential buildings and makeshift structures
prominent skyscraper with large '07' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its forward trajectory, transitioning from the desert canyon to the urban edge. The ferris wheel moves toward the center of the frame as the rocky cliffs pass behind. Highway interchanges and dense low-rise buildings become visible, with a tall tower marked '07' appearing on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk city center with ferris wheel

events.description: view shifts to focus on the city center with the ferris wheel as the central landmark

agents.ego_description: surveying the urban core and central entertainment district from above

entered.detail: industrial buildings constructed from stacked shipping containers
various holographic and neon signs visible on building rooftops

segments.scene_description: The drone now focuses on the heart of Night City, with the massive ferris wheel dominating the center. The tall tower with '07' signage grows larger on the right. The winding highway has faded from view as the camera surveys the dense urban grid of streets and makeshift structures below.

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the tower and city center details

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a stabilized view of the downtown area with the '07' tower now prominent on the right side. The ferris wheel has shifted to the left of the frame. The camera appears to slow or hover, providing a clear view of the dense cyberpunk architecture and the sprawling cityscape extending toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide from the desolate reddish canyons of the Badlands into the dense, towering heart of Night City. It begins by tracking a winding asphalt highway cutting through sparse desert vegetation, with the distant city skyline and a prominent white ferris wheel appearing on the horizon. As the camera maintains its forward trajectory, the rocky cliffs recede to reveal urban highway interchanges and low-rise buildings, while a tall tower marked with 07 signage emerges on the right. The scene then shifts fully into the urban grid, where the highway fades away and the massive ferris wheel dominates the center of the frame. Finally, the camera slows to a hover over the downtown area, positioning the 07 tower prominently on the right and the ferris wheel to the left to provide a sweeping view of the sprawling cyberpunk architecture.
